programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: (M) Jack attempts to convince his parents that lizard people are very real and that some of your favorite celebs may be one.

programme.title: Seatbelt Psychic
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: (M) The team reopens Hans Holzer's case file on the Peck House, one of the oldest homes in Rye, NY, and infamous for its rampant paranormal activity.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
